build_system: Vite 6 with React plugin, Tailwind CSS 3 for styling
verification_instructions: Run `npm run build` to confirm the Vite production build succeeds without errors.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode. No Docker daemon needed. No test framework - rely on build success.
key_patterns: Single-file React app in App.jsx (~5900 lines). State managed with useState hooks. Sub-panels in separate JSX files (TaskPanel.jsx, PinPanel.jsx, ReminderPanel.jsx, MiniMap.jsx). Data persisted to localStorage via projects array. Import/export serializes projects array to JSON.
relevant_files: src/App.jsx - Main app: contains task state (tasks, taskGroups, cardTaskLinks), task CRUD functions (addTaskFromCard, deleteTask, updateTask, locateCard), pin system (addPin, navigateToPin), canvas rendering, context menus, keyboard shortcuts, import/export
src/TaskPanel.jsx - Task panel UI: shows task list/card views, uses cardTaskLinks + nodes props to find linked cards, renders 'Locate card' chip via getLinkedCard helper and onLocateCard prop
src/PinPanel.jsx - Pin panel UI: manages existing canvas pins (separate from task system)
directory_structure: src/ contains all source: App.jsx (main), TaskPanel.jsx, PinPanel.jsx, ReminderPanel.jsx, MiniMap.jsx, main.jsx (entry), index.css (Tailwind). package.json at root. Build outputs to dist/.
